target_audience: NRIs in UAE, UK, USA, Canada, Singapore, Australia

buttons.primary: bg-[#F59E0B] text-[#0A192F] hover:bg-[#D97706] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(245,158,11,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-[#F59E0B]/50 text-[#F59E0B] hover:bg-[#F59E0B]/10 font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300

components.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A192F]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 transition-all duration-300
components.inputs: bg-[#0A192F] border border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#F59E0B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F59E0B] rounded-lg p-3 w-full

images.description: Abstract elegant geometric background in deep navy blue with subtle gold lines
Luxury modern home exterior reflecting sunset
Minimalist glass shield icon with gold and emerald green accents
World map abstract dot matrix glowing in emerald green and gold
Luxurious modern villa in India glowing at twilight

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette and typography rules. DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text.
Implement the 'Demo Dashboard Visual' as an interactive-looking React component using Recharts to show property valuation trends, not just an image. Wrap it in a 'Control Room' grid layout.
The Hero section must have a very premium, high-trust feel. Use the 'hero_background' image with a dark overlay (`bg-[#0A192F]/80` or gradient) to ensure text legibility.
The 'Features Grid' should utilize a Bento layout style, mixing large and small cards.
Use Emerald Green (#10B981) specifically for Trust Signals (checkmarks, verified badges, secure icons).
Use Gold (#F59E0B) for Primary CTAs and highlighting premium tiers in the Pricing section.
All cards must have a subtle border (`border-white/5` or `border-white/10`) to provide crisp edges in dark mode.
Every page section must include `data-testid` attributes for automated testing.
Do not build HTML-based complex components. Use Shadcn UI primitives for Accordions (FAQ), Tabs, Cards, and Forms.
Add 'lucide-react' icons to complement features and dashboard UI.
Use framer-motion for subtle entrance animations (fade up on scroll) for luxury feel.
